ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "range_min" TEXT /* Minimum value the parameter can take */,
  "range_max" TEXT /* Maximum value the parameter can take */,
  "binnable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the parameter can be binned */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., GIDL, GISL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_categories" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., transistor, diode) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the device was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the device was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_params" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter for the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "binned_params" (
  "binned_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each binned parameter */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "bin_value" TEXT /* Value of the bin */,
  "bin_description" TEXT /* Description of the bin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the bin was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the bin was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("binned_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binned_params_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter in this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_versions_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (JSON or text) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the parameter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_access_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit event */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the parameter before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the parameter after the change */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the audit event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit event was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_audits_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit event */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the device parameter before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the device parameter after the change */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the audit event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit event was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_audits_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_param_comments_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)
